title: Server Launch!
body: Welcome to our private Minecraft server! We are running NeoForge 1.21.1 with a carefully curated mod pack. Join us and explore!

title: Launcher Released
body: Our custom launcher is now available. It automatically installs and updates all required mods so you can focus on playing.

title: Mod Pack Update v1.1
body: Several mods have been updated to their latest versions. The launcher will automatically sync your mods on the next launch.
